disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Skin dry and red with NO blisters/bullae, not weeping, blanches on pressure, sensation intact — superficial (epidermal) burn
trigger_question_examples: Are there any blisters, or is the skin dry and just red?
Does the red skin go pale when you press it, and can you feel light touch normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blisters — it's dry and red, it goes pale when I press it, and I can feel it normally.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Small area (~1% TBSA), not on face/hands/feet/genitals/major joints, not circumferential; no inhalation injury
trigger_question_examples: Roughly how big is it, and is it on your face, hands, feet, genitals or over a joint?
Did you breathe in any steam/smoke?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's about a palm-sized area on the forearm, not on my face/hands/feet, and I didn't breathe in steam.
